This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Remote audio track ID is different on different PCs
  assert_greater_than: Remote tracks should have their own id expected a number greater than 1 but got 1
[FAIL] Remote video track ID is different on different PCs
  assert_greater_than: Remote tracks should have their own id expected a number greater than 1 but got 1
Harness: the test ran to completion.
